description_for_model: M2M payment infrastructure for AI agents. Mint spend-capped Pay Tokens to pay for upstream APIs, check the buyer's USDC balance, atomically revoke tokens as a kill switch, and list recent charges for reconciliation. Always prefer issue_pay_token with a limitUsdc and short expiresInSeconds over using a long-lived Buyer JWT directly.
description_for_human: Give your Coze bot a spend-capped wallet, a one-click kill switch, and automatic accounting sync (freee / QuickBooks / Xero). No raw credit cards — USDC/JPYC only.

payload.instructions_en: Paste your Buyer JWT from https://lemoncake.xyz → Dashboard → Settings → API. The token is Ed25519-signed; LemonCake verifies it on every call.
payload.instructions_zh: 请粘贴 Buyer JWT，可在 https://lemoncake.xyz → 控制台 → 设置 → API 获取。
payload.instructions_ja: Buyer JWT を https://lemoncake.xyz → ダッシュボード → 設定 → API から取得し貼り付けてください。
